iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 06:00 — CRITICAL RISING. Iran claims 700 missiles + 3,600 drones fired since war began — massive arsenal display. Prolonged war increases desperation risk for nuclear escalation. 42 + 7 (coupling) = 49.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 18 06:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING). Japan & Australia refuse Hormuz escort role. Iran claims Hormuz 'controlled not closed.' 700 missiles + 3,600 drones fired since start. Trump says deal 'not imminent.' 100 (capped).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 18 06:00 — IMMINENT 96 (RISING). IDF strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut overnight. UK pledges $6M+ Lebanon aid. FM still denying ceasefire. 96 + 3 (Iran coupling) = 96.

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) + 8 (Russia coupling) = 86.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: Day 18 06:00 — IMMINENT 76 (RISING). Finland nuclear hosting tension continues. Russia supplying drones to Iran. 76 + 4 (Iran coupling) + 4 (Turkey coupling) = 84.

china.notes: Day 18 06:00 — CRITICAL RISING. Large-scale Chinese military flights return to Taiwan after 2+ week absence. Taiwan announces $40B defense budget. Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over Hormuz. China mediates Pak-Afghan. 34 (rising).

north_korea.notes: Day 18 06:00 — IMMINENT RISING. Kim + daughter oversee 12x 600mm KN-25 test. 10 ballistic missiles fired from Pyongyang region during US-ROK Freedom Shield drills. KCNA warns 'tactical nuclear strike capability.' 68 (rising).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 18 06:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING). France to deliver SAMP/T NG anti-ballistic system to Ukraine. 97 drones fired overnight, 90 intercepted. 6 killed in Saturday strikes. Zelensky waiting on US/Russia for next talks. 100 + 8 (Turkey coupling) + 6 (Russia coupling) = 100.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 18 06:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING). Pakistan strikes Kandahar overnight (equipment storage). Afghanistan retaliates on South Waziristan camp, claims 'heavy casualties.' China urges ceasefire. AP: 'deadliest fighting yet.' 100 (capped).

Pakistan strikes Kandahar overnight, Afghanistan retaliates on South Waziristan — 'deadliest fighting yet' (AP/Reuters)
China resumes large-scale military flights near Taiwan after 2+ week absence (Reuters/Taiwan MoD)
Trump says Iran deal 'not imminent' — diplomatic track flatlines (CNBC/AF1)
Iran claims 'control' of Strait of Hormuz while zero commercial traffic flows (IRGC/Times Now)
France to deliver SAMP/T NG anti-ballistic missile system to Ukraine — new Western arms pipeline (ISW)
Taiwan announces $40 billion special defense budget amid China military resurgence (Reuters)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 06:00): ZERO de-escalation channels active. China mediating Pak-Afghan but fighting intensifies. Japan/Australia refuse Hormuz — coalition weakening. Trump admits deal 'not imminent.' France sending arms to Ukraine. Global score 86 STABLE but underlying dynamics worsening: DPRK spike, China resurging, Iran nuclear zone moving toward critical.

latest_news.headline: Heavy US-Israeli airstrikes continue across Tehran — fresh waves reported this morning
latest_news.text: Explosions reported across Tehran this morning as US-Israeli strikes intensify. IRGC 50th wave of attacks on US bases in UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait confirmed. Iran warns US to move industries out of Middle East.

latest_news.headline: IRGC vows to 'pursue and kill' Netanyahu — direct assassination threat against Israeli PM
latest_news.text: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps issues direct threat against Netanyahu: will 'pursue and kill' him. Escalating rhetoric amid ongoing missile exchanges.

latest_news.headline: US oil prices surge above $100/barrel for first time as Hormuz remains effectively shut
latest_news.text: US crude oil crosses $100/barrel threshold as Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed. Iran selectively controlling passage. Japan and Australia refuse escort role. Air India cancels Dubai flights.

latest_news.headline: Trump says Iran wants ceasefire but 'terms not acceptable' — mixed signals on diplomacy
latest_news.text: Trump: Iran 'ready to negotiate ceasefire' but terms 'aren't good enough.' Contrasts with earlier 'deal not imminent.' Mixed signals from Washington on diplomatic track.

latest_news.headline: WHO warns of toxic 'black rain' health risk from Iranian fuel depot strikes
latest_news.text: WHO issues warning about contaminated 'black rain' from strikes on Iranian fuel depots. Thick smoke mixing with rain clouds creating hazardous precipitation. Environmental catastrophe deepening.

latest_news.headline: Iran strikes two vessels in Strait of Hormuz — Liberia-flagged and Thai bulk carrier attacked
latest_news.text: IRGC confirms striking two vessels in Hormuz: a Liberia-flagged ship claimed Israeli-owned and a Thai bulk carrier that ignored warnings. Shipping insurance rates spike. Citi, PwC evacuate Gulf offices.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon confirms 140 US service members wounded, 7 killed since Operation Epic Fury began
latest_news.text: Pentagon updates casualties: ~140 wounded, 7 killed since Feb 28. Additional KC-135 tanker crash in western Iraq during operations. US casualties mounting across multiple theaters.

latest_news.headline: PM Modi calls Iran's President Pezeshkian — expresses concern over civilian casualties and energy transit
latest_news.text: India PM Modi calls Iranian President Pezeshkian. Expresses concern over civilian casualties, stresses safety of Indian nationals and uninterrupted energy transit. India walks diplomatic tightrope.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Kandahar overnight, Afghanistan retaliates on South Waziristan — 'deadliest fighting yet'
latest_news.text: Pakistan hits Taliban installations in Kandahar overnight. Afghanistan retaliates on Pakistani camp in South Waziristan, claims heavy casualties. China urges ceasefire. AP: 'deadliest fighting between the two nations.'

latest_news.headline: IDF strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut overnight as two-front war intensifies
latest_news.text: IDF announces series of strikes on Hezbollah targets in Beirut. Iran fires 2 missile salvos at Israel overnight, no injuries reported. UK pledges $6M+ Lebanon aid.

latest_news.headline: North Korea fires 10 ballistic missiles + tests 12 nuclear-capable KN-25 launchers with Kim and daughter present
latest_news.text: South Korea detected 10 ballistic missiles from Pyongyang region. Kim Jong Un + daughter oversee 12x 600mm KN-25 test. KCNA warns 'tactical nuclear strike capability.' Coincides with US-ROK Freedom Shield drills.

latest_news.headline: Large-scale Chinese military flights return to Taiwan after 2+ week absence
latest_news.text: Taiwan reports return of large-scale PLA air force activities around island after unexplained 2+ week lull. Reversal of de-escalation trend.

latest_news.headline: France to deliver SAMP/T NG anti-ballistic missile system to Ukraine
latest_news.text: France to give Ukraine newest SAMP/T NG anti-aircraft system for testing against Russian ballistic missiles. New Western arms pipeline despite Iran war consuming attention.

latest_news.headline: Russia fires 97 drones at Ukraine, 90 intercepted — 6 killed in Saturday strikes
latest_news.text: Russia hammered Ukraine with 97 drones overnight. Ukrainian air defense intercepted 90. 6 killed in Saturday missile/drone attacks across multiple regions.

latest_news.headline: Trump says deal 'not imminent' — diplomatic track flatlines despite ceasefire rhetoric
latest_news.text: Trump: 'Iran deal not imminent' while calling for world to secure Hormuz. Iran FM rejects dialogue. Mixed messaging: says Iran wants ceasefire but 'terms not acceptable.'

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION — Global war probability 86% (Day 18 07:00). NO de-escalation channels active. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100 capped: Heavy airstrikes continue across Tehran. IRGC 50th wave. Oil crosses $100/barrel. Trump mixed: 'Iran wants ceasefire' but 'terms not acceptable.' Japan/Australia refuse Hormuz. IRGC vows to 'kill Netanyahu.' (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 96: IDF strikes Beirut. Two-front war. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100 capped: France sends SAMP/T. 97 drones overnight. US talks stalled. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100 capped: Kandahar + South Waziristan strikes. 'Deadliest fighting yet.' (5) DPRK IMMINENT 68 RISING: 10 ballistic missiles + KN-25 nuclear test. (6) CHINA CRITICAL 34 RISING: PLA flights resume, Taiwan $40B defense. (7) RUSSIA-NATO CRITICAL 76: Finland nuclear hosting. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 42 RISING: Prolonged war desperation risk. KEY: Tehran strikes intensifying as Day 18 begins. Oil shock now real at $100+. IRGC escalation rhetoric (kill Netanyahu). WHO black rain environmental warning. Modi calls Pezeshkian — India diplomatic balancing act. Iran strikes ships in Hormuz — shipping insurance spiking, corporate evacuations expanding.
